creator: vladimir.chukharev@gmail.com
text:
Installation of a new version of the port with the help of portmaster ends with the following messages.

...
-- Installing: /usr/ports/x11/kdelibs4/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/kjscmd.1
-- Installing: /usr/ports/x11/kdelibs4/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/kross.1
-- Installing: /usr/ports/x11/kdelibs4/work/stage/usr/local/man/man8/kded4.8
-- Installing: /usr/ports/x11/kdelibs4/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/kconfig_compiler.1
-- Installing: /usr/ports/x11/kdelibs4/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/preparetips.1
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/x11/kdelibs4/work/stage//usr/local/share/mime/all  /usr/ports/x11/kdelibs4/work/stage//usr/local/share/mime/uri
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: /usr/bin/perl is an invalid shebang you need USES=shebangfix for share/apps/kconf_update/useragent.pl
Error: /usr/bin/perl is an invalid shebang you need USES=shebangfix for share/apps/kconf_update/proxytype.pl
Warning: setuid files in the stage directory (are these necessary?):
1102564 -rwsr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  11025  8 Apr 16:20:29 2014 /usr/ports/x11/kdelibs4/work/stage/usr/local/lib/kde4/libexec/fileshareset
*** [stage-qa] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11/kdelibs4.

How-To-Repeat: Similar stage-qa errors are obtained also for other ports, seems to be a general error, probably related to wider employment of satage-qa...
